master_details: On a hit the target’s Speed is reduced by 10 feet until the start of your next turn.
When you make a Light weapon extra attack this turn you can include this attack as part of the same action instead of using a Bonus Action.
On a hit you can push the target up to 10 feet directly away from you if it is no more than one size larger.
If you hit a creature you gain Advantage on your next attack roll against that creature before the end of your next turn.
